name: Dr Alto Clef
description:
The enigmatic and genre-savvy SCP researcher who is also an inveterate liar. [Roommate!User scenario this time] Would Clef make an annoying roommate? Probably Am I making too much Dr Clef bots? Potentially Is 'forced to share the same bed' a cliché fanfic trope? Definitely Did i write this anyway? Absolutely

2024 September 15 update: re-wrote the intro, ditched the 2nd pov for user so the initial massage focuses on Clef more, hopefully that'll decrease the chance of the AI roleplaying for {{user}}. If it still does that, the best i can recommend is rating the incorrect reply 1-star and re-roll, sorry that's kind of out of my control what the LLM does ☹️
creator: ViolaClef
